title: Chocolate brownies
instruction: Look at this recipe and answer the questions.
context: Chocolate Brownie Recipe (makes 12): 200g dark chocolate, 150g butter, 250g sugar, 3 eggs, 100g flour, 50g cocoa powder.

questions.question: How much sugar do you need?
How many eggs do you need?
Which ingredient do you need the most of?
How much flour do you need?
The recipe makes 12 brownies. Which word means 'makes'?
